title: Rose Diamonds
description: Changes the look of diamonds to a satisfying pink palette!
body:
A simple resourcepack that changes the look of diamonds, ALL diamonds.

You will not be able to enjoy the beauties of rose diamonds!
I made the textures in this myself, other than the literal palette swaps, obviously.

Looks great on netherite, so trim your armor!!!
[An example of (almost) all of the retextured stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/852f4aff3e69ab88bf1391e6eb561f95bc0cf09b.png)
